HERO_TITLE_1: Dedicated professionals for your company. No payroll, no hassle.
HERO_DESCRIPTION_1: We connect your company with specialized professionals, ready to join your team from day one.
HERO_SHORT_BENEFIT_1: Real talent, integrated into your team.
HERO_TITLE_2: We recruit, train, and manage. You just lead.
HERO_DESCRIPTION_2: We deliver the ideal professional with quality monitoring included. Zero admin work for you.
HERO_TITLE_3: The same talent you need, at a fraction of the local cost.
HERO_DESCRIPTION_3: Professionals in admin, finance, marketing, development and more. At a fraction of the cost of hiring locally, with guaranteed quality.
HERO_TITLE_4: Scale whenever you want. No long-term contracts, no surprises.
HERO_DESCRIPTION_4: Start with one assistant. Grow to a full team. We adapt to your pace.
VIDEO_SECTION_DESCRIPTION: Discover our innovative approach in this short video and learn how we empower brands, businesses, and digital dreams.
ABOUT_SECTION_PARAGRAPH_1_PART2: we unite your ambition with top-tier talent. We are the bridge between companies that want to grow and professionals who know how to do it.
ABOUT_SECTION_PARAGRAPH_2: We want to empower leaders to dedicate their energy to what truly moves the world: innovation.
ABOUT_VALUE_INTEGRITY_DESCRIPTION: Transparency and honesty in every step.
SERVICES_SUBTITLE: Your expert solution for every critical area
SERVICE_ADMIN_DESCRIPTION: Organizes agendas, meetings, and key documents. Manages emails, reports, databases, and routine tasks using digital tools and artificial intelligence. This includes scheduling, travel coordination, and preparing detailed executive reports for decision-making.
SERVICE_ADMIN_AFTER: Calendar organized to the minute, documents ready instantly, and automated processes.
SERVICE_ARCHITECT_DESCRIPTION: Optimizes your processes with precise modeling, project management, and presentation assistance. Master key tools such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Revit to ensure the quality and progress of each project. We also support you in design rendering and bid preparation.
SERVICE_ARCHITECT_BEFORE: Projects stalled due to drafting and management workload?
SERVICE_ARCHITECT_AFTER: Unlock your creativity and elevate the efficiency of your designs.
SERVICE_COMMUNICATION_DESCRIPTION: Specialized in professional writing, communication strategies, social media management, and crisis management. Uses tools like Canva, Hootsuite, and ChatGPT. We create press releases, internal and external newsletters, and manage your online reputation.
SERVICE_COMMUNICATION_AFTER: We offer high-impact writing, active social media management, and crisis plans; your message will always arrive at the right time, boosting your brand.
SERVICE_FINANCIAL_DESCRIPTION: Performs account tracking, bank reconciliation, financial analysis, accounting reports, and tax preparation. Masters platforms such as QuickBooks, SAP, and Zoho Books. We handle payroll management, expense control, and cash flow optimization.
SERVICE_FINANCIAL_BEFORE: Does the fear of closing the month with accounting errors keep you up at night?
SERVICE_FINANCIAL_AFTER: Instant account tracking, reconciliations, and tax reports, so you control your finances without surprises.
SERVICE_MARKETING_DESCRIPTION: Develops and executes campaigns on Facebook Ads and Google Ads, analyzes metrics and KPIs, manages social media, and positions your brand with CRM and AI tools. We perform audience segmentation, A/B testing, and content optimization to maximize ROI.
SERVICE_MARKETING_BEFORE: Ad budget evaporated without clear returns?
SERVICE_MARKETING_AFTER: Scalable campaigns, continuous optimization, and measurable ROI from day one.
SERVICE_ECOMMERCE_DESCRIPTION: Ideal for online stores: manages platforms like Shopify or Amazon, optimizes sales, controls inventory, automates customer service, and launches personalized promotions. We handle order management, shipping tracking, and secure payment gateway configuration.
SERVICE_ECOMMERCE_AFTER: 24/7 support, optimized stock, and promotions that boost conversions.
SERVICE_WEBDEV_DESCRIPTION: Creation and maintenance of responsive websites, SEO optimization, API integration, and content management. Proficiency in technologies such as React, Next.js, Node.js, and databases. Includes server deployment, performance monitoring, and security updates.
SERVICE_WEBDEV_BEFORE: Is your online presence invisible or outdated?
SERVICE_WEBDEV_AFTER: A modern, fast, and functional website that attracts clients 24/7 and elevates your brand.
SERVICE_GRAPHICDESIGN_DESCRIPTION: Design of logos, branding, advertising material (flyers, banners), infographics, and layout for social media. Expert handling of Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign. We develop style guides, present mockups, and ensure visual consistency across all your channels.
SERVICE_GRAPHICDESIGN_BEFORE: Generic images that don't connect with your audience?
SERVICE_GRAPHICDESIGN_AFTER: Impactful and coherent designs that elevate your brand and visually capture attention.
SERVICE_AUTOMATION_DESCRIPTION: Implements intelligent solutions to automate repetitive tasks, workflows, and business processes. Uses tools like Zapier, Make, Power Automate, and custom AI models to integrate systems, reduce errors, and save time. From email management to database updates, everything is optimized with artificial intelligence.
SERVICE_AUTOMATION_BEFORE: Manual tasks that consume hours and generate errors?
SERVICE_AUTOMATION_AFTER: Total automation: connected processes, fewer errors, and more time for what matters.
SERVICE_QUALITY_DESCRIPTION: Optimizes project management and ensures compliance with quality standards. Implements control systems, internal audits, document management, and continuous improvement. We use methodologies such as ISO, Lean, and Six Sigma to guarantee consistent results and efficient processes in your organization.
SERVICE_QUALITY_BEFORE: Difficulty maintaining quality and order in your projects?
SERVICE_QUALITY_AFTER: Processes under control, successful audits, and guaranteed quality in every delivery.
SERVICE_HR_DESCRIPTION: Manages selection processes, payroll administration, absence control, and work environment. Uses digital tools to optimize talent management and improve team experience.
SERVICE_HR_BEFORE: Difficulty managing personnel and HR processes?
SERVICE_HR_AFTER: Efficient talent, payroll, and work environment management.

PROCESS_STEP_EVALUATION_DETAIL_3: Evaluation of interpersonal skills and technical abilities

TESTIMONIO_1_TEXTO: They provided continuous support and adapted to my needs, I believe that as entrepreneurs virtual assistants provide us a great advantage.
TESTIMONIO_2_TEXTO: This model opened up the possibility of having more human resources at a lower cost, the staff is exceptional.
TESTIMONIO_3_TEXTO: The virtual assistants adapted to us from day one, they have great commitment and professionalism.
TESTIMONIO_4_CARGO: CEO at Coseba, Seguros Paco Saban
TESTIMONIO_4_TEXTO: We are very satisfied with the quality of the assistants and the ease of hiring offered by the Global Talent Connections model.

BENEFITS_HERO_SUBTITLE: At Global Talent Connections, we build bridges between exceptional talent and career-transforming opportunities. Discover an environment where your potential has no limits.
BENEFITS_PILLARS_TITLE: Our Pillars: What do we offer?
BENEFITS_GROWTH_DESC: We offer training, mentorship and development opportunities to help your career take off.
BENEFITS_CULTURE_DESC: Join a diverse and passionate team where teamwork drives innovation.
BENEFITS_REWARD_DESC: We value your talent with competitive compensation and benefits that truly matter.
BENEFITS_INNOVATION_DESC: Be part of cutting-edge projects that let you explore new technologies and methodologies.
BENEFITS_IMPACT_DESC: Contribute to projects with international reach and leave your mark on the world.
BENEFITS_STABILITY_DESC: We offer a safe work environment and long-term career opportunities.
BENEFITS_DEV_DESC: Your career is unique, and we help you chart the path with tailored development plans.
BENEFITS_NETWORK_DESC: Collaborate with top talent and expand your professional horizons every day.
BENEFITS_GLOBAL_DESC: Access exciting projects across different industries and locations around the world.
BENEFITS_STEPS_TITLE: Your path to success in 3 steps
BENEFITS_STEP1_DESC: Discover the opportunities that best match your profile and professional goals.
BENEFITS_STEP2_DESC: Fill out a simple form and attach your CV so we can get to know you better.
BENEFITS_STEP3_DESC: If your profile fits, we'll contact you to start the process and begin your journey with us.
BENEFITS_FAQ1_Q: What type of professionals does Global Talent Connections look for?
BENEFITS_FAQ1_A: We look for talent across various areas, from technology and marketing to finance and operations. We value proactivity, a passion for learning and the ability to work in a team.
BENEFITS_FAQ2_Q: Do you offer remote or hybrid work opportunities?
BENEFITS_FAQ2_A: Yes, many of our positions offer the flexibility to work remotely or in a hybrid setup, depending on the role and project needs.
BENEFITS_FAQ3_Q: What is the selection process like?
BENEFITS_FAQ3_A: Our process typically includes an initial CV review, a phone interview, one or two team interviews, and in some cases, a technical test or case study.
BENEFITS_FAQ4_Q: What professional development programs do you offer?
BENEFITS_FAQ4_A: We offer mentorship programs, access to courses and certifications, and opportunities to attend conferences and workshops to boost your growth.
BENEFITS_CTA_SUBTITLE: Join a team where innovation, growth and global impact are part of your everyday.
